name: lint-runner
description: Run external CLI linters and show diagnostics in the editor.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: LintRunner loads in untrusted workspaces, but configured commands are disabled until the workspace is trusted.

lintRunner.debounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds before running linters and fixers after a file is saved. Useful when auto-save is enabled with a short interval. Set to 0 to disable debouncing.

lintRunner.ignorePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files to skip. Checked against the file name, workspace-relative path, and full path. Files matching any pattern are not linted or fixed.

lintRunner.respectGitignore.description: Skip files ignored by .gitignore. Requires git to be available on PATH. The workspace root is used as the working directory for git check-ignore.

lintRunner.targets.markdownDescription: Target-first configurations. Put shared file patterns and shared pre-commands on a target, then list linters and fixers for that file set.

name.description: Target display name shown in LintRunner output.

filePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files this target applies to. At least one of `filePatterns` or `languages` is required.

languages.description: VS Code language identifiers this target applies to (e.g. `["php", "javascript"]`). Matched against the open document's language ID. At least one of `filePatterns` or `languages` is required.

run.description: Default run mode for linters in this target. 'onOpen' runs when a file opens and again on save.

preCommands.markdownDescription: Commands to run once before this target's linters. They run sequentially; a non-zero exit code skips target linters.

name.description: Optional display name shown in the LintRunner output.

command.description: Executable to invoke before target linters. Must be on PATH or an absolute path. Supports ~ and command variables.

args.description: Arguments passed to the pre-command. Supports command variables.

linters.description: Linter commands to run for matching files.

name.description: Display name shown in the Problems panel source column.

command.description: Executable to invoke. Must be on PATH or an absolute path. Supports ~ and command variables.

args.description: Arguments passed to the command. Supports command variables.

preCommands.markdownDescription: Commands to run before this linter. They run sequentially; a non-zero exit code skips the linter.

name.description: Optional display name shown in the LintRunner output.

command.description: Executable to invoke before this linter. Must be on PATH or an absolute path. Supports ~ and command variables.

args.description: Arguments passed to the pre-command. Supports command variables.

fixCommand.markdownDescription: Legacy per-linter command to run when `LintRunner: Run Fixers` is invoked. Set `run` to `onSave` to also run on save. Prefer target-level `fixers` for new configs.

name.description: Optional display name shown in the LintRunner output.

command.description: Executable to invoke for auto-fixing. Must be on PATH or an absolute path. Supports ~ and command variables.

args.description: Arguments passed to the fix command. Supports command variables.

run.description: 'manual' runs only via the command; 'onSave' also runs when a matching file is saved.

parser.description: Regex parser: extract diagnostics using named capture groups in the pattern.

pattern.description: JavaScript regular expression. Named capture groups: `line` and `message` are required; `col`, `severity` (error/warning/info), and `code` are optional.

flags.description: JavaScript regex flags (e.g. "gm"). The 'g' flag is added automatically.

output.description: Which output stream(s) to parse. Defaults to 'both'.

defaultSeverity.description: Severity to use when the regex pattern does not capture a severity group.

messageFormat.description: How to decode the captured message group. Use 'json' when matching inside JSON string values.

run.description: Override target run mode for this linter. 'onOpen' runs when a file opens and again on save.

showDiagnosticCodes.markdownDescription: Override target diagnostic code visibility for this linter.

fixers.markdownDescription: Commands to run when `LintRunner: Run Fixers` is invoked for files matching this target. Set `run` to `onSave` to also run on save.

name.description: Optional display name shown in the LintRunner output.

command.description: Executable to invoke for auto-fixing. Must be on PATH or an absolute path. Supports ~ and command variables.

args.description: Arguments passed to the fix command. Supports command variables.

run.description: 'manual' runs only via the command; 'onSave' also runs when a matching file is saved.

showDiagnosticCodes.markdownDescription: Default diagnostic code visibility for linters in this target.

lintRunner.linters.markdownDescription: List of linter configurations to run against matching files.
lintRunner.linters.markdownDeprecationMessage: Use `lintRunner.targets` instead. The legacy linter-first config remains supported for compatibility.

name.description: Display name shown in the Problems panel source column.

filePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files this linter applies to (e.g. ["*.sh"]). At least one of `filePatterns` or `languages` is required.

languages.description: VS Code language identifiers this linter applies to (e.g. `["php"]`). At least one of `filePatterns` or `languages` is required.

command.description: Executable to invoke. Must be on PATH or an absolute path. Supports ~ and command variables.

args.description: Arguments passed to the command. Supports command variables.

preCommands.markdownDescription: Commands to run before this linter. They run sequentially; a non-zero exit code skips the linter. Use `${file}` for the file path.

name.description: Optional display name shown in the LintRunner output.

command.description: Executable to invoke before this linter. Must be on PATH or an absolute path. Supports ~ and command variables.

args.description: Arguments passed to the pre-command. Supports command variables.

fixCommand.markdownDescription: Command to run when `LintRunner: Run Fixers` is invoked. Set `run` to `onSave` to also run on save. Use `${file}` for the file path.

name.description: Optional display name shown in the LintRunner output.

command.description: Executable to invoke for auto-fixing. Must be on PATH or an absolute path. Supports ~ and command variables.

args.description: Arguments passed to the fix command. Supports command variables.

run.description: 'manual' runs only via the command; 'onSave' also runs when a matching file is saved.

parser.description: Regex parser: extract diagnostics using named capture groups in the pattern.

pattern.description: JavaScript regular expression. Named capture groups: `line` and `message` are required; `col`, `severity` (error/warning/info), and `code` are optional.

flags.description: JavaScript regex flags (e.g. "gm"). The 'g' flag is added automatically.

output.description: Which output stream(s) to parse. Defaults to 'both'.

defaultSeverity.description: Severity to use when the regex pattern does not capture a severity group.

messageFormat.description: How to decode the captured message group. Use 'json' when matching inside JSON string values.

run.description: 'onOpen' runs when a file opens and again on save; 'onSave' runs on save; 'manual' only runs via the command.

showDiagnosticCodes.markdownDescription: Show diagnostic rule codes in Problems, e.g. `phpcs(PSR2.Files.EndFileNewline.NoneFound)`. Set to `false` to show only the linter source, e.g. `phpcs`.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
